name: Trimmed Down Chocoberry Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen strawberries in syrup (Thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Mix graham cracker crumbs with melted butter or margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan.
3. In a food processor, blend cottage cheese until smooth. Add cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, and thawed frozen strawberries. Process until smooth.
4. Stir in thawed egg substitute. Pour gently into the graham cracker layer in the pan.
5. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until nearly set in the center. Allow cooling completely on a wire rack.
6. Refrigerate before serving cold, topped with whipped topping and strawberries. Serves 14. Calories: 152, Fat: 6 grams per serving.
